channel.title: gpg on Delnegend's Cave
channel.description: Recent content in gpg on Delnegend's Cave

item.title: How to automatically sign commits with SSH key
item.description: Generating a new SSH key Read this to learn how to generate a public/private key pair. Adding the SSH key to your GitHub account Profile > Settings > SSH and GPG keys > New SSH key Enter a title of your choice and the public key. Change key type to Signing key and click Add SSH key. Configuring Git to sign commits by default 1 2 3 git config --global commit.
